blocks.content:
Every Grafana instance starts with a default notification policy. Without editing it, all alerts route to a single contact point with default grouping. That means every team gets every alert, grouped only by rule name and folder.

Editing the default policy lets you control two things:

- **Where** unmatched alerts go (the fallback contact point)
- **How** those alerts are grouped into notifications
In the next milestone, you navigate to the Notification policies page.
